Video.summary: 32-year-old Campbell captures his second trophy of the season with a playoff victory over Emiliano Grillo.
Video.title: Brian Campbell wins 2025 John Deere Classic

Image.alt: Brian Campbell wins 2025 John Deere Classic
Brian Campbell wins 2025 John Deere Classic
Brian Campbell wins 2025 John Deere Classic

Video.summary: Sepp Straka captures his third PGA TOUR victory after winning The American Express 2025.
Video.title: Sepp Straka wins The American Express

Image.alt: Sepp Straka wins The American Express
Sepp Straka wins The American Express
Sepp Straka wins The American Express

Video.summary: Puerto Rico's Rafael Campos wins by three strokes for his maiden win on the PGA TOUR at 36 years of age.
Video.title: Rafael Campos secures an emotional win at the Butterfield Bermuda Championship

Image.alt: Rafael Campos secures an emotional win at the Butterfield Bermuda Championship
Rafael Campos secures an emotional win at the Butterfield Bermuda Championship
Rafael Campos secures an emotional win at the Butterfield Bermuda Championship

Video.summary: Patton Kizzire claims his third PGA TOUR title after winning the 2024 Procore Championship.
Video.title: Patton Kizzire wins Procore Championship

Video.title: PGA TOUR Originals | The Drop
